title: Recruitment Consultant (Full Commissions + Account Opening Bonus)
description:
About Us

We’re a cosy, boutique recruitment and consulting team — small in size but big on values. We believe in doing meaningful work, supporting one another, and growing together. If you’re looking for a warm, ethical, and people-first environment where your voice matters, you’ll feel right at home with us.

Role Summary

As a Recruitment Consultant, you’ll manage the entire recruitment cycle — from sourcing to placement — while working with autonomy and purpose. You’ll enjoy team support, shared resources (like job ad credits), and opportunities to collaborate, all within a culture that values integrity, camaraderie, and accountability.

Key Responsibilities

  • Manage full-cycle recruitment: client intake, sourcing, screening, closing
  • Build strong relationships with clients and candidates alike
  • Collaborate with fellow recruiters when needed — we’re stronger together
  • Ensure timely updates and data hygiene in our ATS
  • Uphold our standards of professionalism, ethics, and transparency
  • Occasionally support recruitment marketing initiatives or special projects

Requirements

  • 2–3+ years of 360 recruitment experience
  • CEI Certification (Singapore) is mandatory
  • Proven sourcing and closing abilities
  • Excellent interpersonal and communication skills
  • Able to work independently while being a team player
  • Familiar with remote tools and applicant tracking systems

Flexible Work Arrangement (FWA)

We offer flexibility, but also believe in nurturing real team culture. As such, all freelancers are expected to:

  • Join the team in the office at least once a week
  • Spend 2 to 3 hours with the team during that day
  • Have lunch together — not just to connect professionally, but as people

This helps us stay aligned, build rapport, and share insights more meaningfully.

What You’ll Enjoy

  • Commission-based earnings (no cap)
  • Bonus for each account opened
  • Shared job ad credits and recruitment tools
  • A collaborative, low-ego, high-trust work environment
  • Opportunities to grow alongside a purpose-driven team
  • Hybrid flexibility with a human-first culture

postedCompany.description:
Tyson Jay is a leading recruitment agency in Singapore that excels in delivering holistic solutions tailored to meet the unique needs of our clients. Specializing in executive search, permanent placement and career coaching, we are dedicated to aligning talent strategies with organizational goals to drive sustained business success.

With expertise in recruitment, we leverage our deep industry knowledge and extensive networks to identify and attract top talent that fits seamlessly into our clients' teams. At Tyson Jay, we foster a culture of collaboration, emphasizing teamwork and shared goals. We believe in working closely with our clients to understand their challenges and aspirations, ensuring that together, we achieve impactful results.

Our personalized coaching programs empower professionals, guiding them through strategic career advancements and personal growth. By combining expert recruitment services with tailored career development strategies, Tyson Jay stands as your trusted partner in building resilient and high performing teams. In addition, we offer personalised coaching designed to guide professionals towards career advancement.


Connect with us at www.tysonjay.sg
postedCompany.name: TYSON JAY MANAGEMENT PTE. LTD.
